description.part1: {{brand}} is an interactive educational platform designed to gamify technical interview preparation. The platform helps build a clear learning structure and turns routine material review into an engaging process.
description.part2: We created an environment where you can systematically level up your coding skills and gain confidence for real interviews.

basicJs.title: Basic JavaScript
basicJs.text: The foundation of web development. Dive into syntax, basic data types, functions, arrays, objects, and DOM interaction basics.

advancedJs.title: Advanced JavaScript
advancedJs.text: Complex language concepts under the hood. In-depth analysis of execution context (this), closures, prototypal inheritance, and async.

algorithms.title: Algorithms & Data Structures
algorithms.text: Logical thinking training for algorithmic interview sections. Study data structures, evaluate algorithm time complexity (Big O).

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.text: The modern typing standard. Learn static types, interfaces, generics, and advanced language features to write reliable code.

audience.a: A: The platform is suitable for both beginner developers building their foundation and experienced professionals looking to brush up on complex concepts and algorithms before technical interviews.

feature.q: Q: What is the main feature of the platform?
feature.a: A: We use gamification. Instead of dryly reading documentation, you solve interactive exercises that simulate real interview tasks, making routine preparation engaging.

process.q: Q: How does the learning process work?
process.a: A: You decide how you want to learn: through interactive quizzes to check your skills or AI-powered chat for deep theoretical exploration. By opting for a quiz, you choose a topic, complete a series of practical tasks, and get a comprehensive summary of your progress and recommendations at the end.

free.q: Q: Is it free to use?
free.a: A: Absolutely! RS-Tandem is completely free. You get full access to all features, including AI-powered consultations and interactive quizzes, with no hidden costs or premium subscriptions.

features.heading: AI
features.description:
Practice JS/TS with an AI tutor right inside the platform.
Ask questions, request explanations, or get hints for tricky topics.
The chat streams responses and keeps the dialogue context.
Perfect for quick clarifications, interview prep, and focused learning sessions

features.heading: Challenges
features.description: Solve interactive JS and algorithmic tasks from top-tier tech interviews. Master the specific logic and data structures you'll face in real-world technical screenings. Write code, run tests, and track your progress as you bridge the gap between basic coding and high-level engineering

features.heading: Quiz
features.description:
Pick a category and topic, then answer programming questions fast.
You have 2 minutes — a quick interview warm-up.
After the round you get your score, feedback, and links to reinforce learning and go deeper.
Earn badges and track your progress over time
